title: 'podman system df' usage not consistent.
body:
`podman system df` shows 1 container in use with a total of 24.8GB space taken
```
$ sudo podman system df
TYPE           TOTAL   ACTIVE  SIZE     RECLAIMABLE
Images         2       1       1.428GB  988.7MB (0%)
Containers     1       0       24.8GB   24.8GB (100%)
Local Volumes  2       0       266.4MB  266.4MB (100%)
```
`podman system df -v` shows different values
```
$ sudo podman system df -v

Images space usage:

REPOSITORY                     TAG        IMAGE ID      CREATED  SIZE     SHARED SIZE  UNIQUE SIZE  CONTAINERS
docker.io/thelounge/thelounge  latest     4e5bbf8c9891  2 weeks  988.7MB  0B           988.7MB      0
docker.io/cm2network/csgo      sourcemod  a75c847a6a9a  4 days   438.9MB  0B           438.9MB      1

Containers space usage:

CONTAINER ID  IMAGE         COMMAND        LOCAL VOLUMES  SIZE     CREATED  STATUS  NAMES
7ee24ee6ec87  a75c847a6a9a  bash entry.sh  2              432.9MB  3 days   exited  csgo

Local Volumes space usage:

VOLUME NAME                                                       LINKS   SIZE
3022add204a5071b38e6dbb17a91a7a2f9d8391a65bb90e4dd1e1bd40a3cb532  0       266.4MB
450e719fdbbd911f5c7c0af43c39df63b2cf8f2134b859a5ee94ba3bb10da16a  0       0B
```
It seems like `podman system df -v` does not take the containers volume into account (contrary to the non-verbose option), but still the ~24GB is not listed under volumes.
